exampleContent.sectionSubtitle: Real prompts and articles from this template

prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your music learning forward
items: Visit 3 music stores to test and compare different instruments within your budget and skill level
Research and compare 5 different instrument options by reading reviews, watching demonstration videos, and consulting with experienced musicians
Research 5 different instrument sizes and models to find the perfect physical fit for your body type and hand size
Learn and practice proper posture and hand positioning for your chosen instrument
Learn the basic music theory fundamentals relevant to your instrument and goals
Choose and purchase or access your primary learning materials and method books
